data.body: Done definition update: Define partial-failure semantics between property PUT and comment add. Story 6449-eb07 (Jira bridge) performs TWO outbound side-effects: (a) property PUT via _direct_rest_put; (b) comment add via AcliClient.add_comment. This story extends BRIDGE_ALERT handling to BOTH channels: (1) when the property PUT succeeds but the comment add fails, write BRIDGE_ALERT with reason FILE_IMPACT_COMMENT_SYNC_FAILED (distinct from FILE_IMPACT_SYNC_FAILED); (2) when the comment add succeeds but the property PUT fails, still attempt/complete the comment add (do not short-circuit) and emit BRIDGE_ALERT with reason FILE_IMPACT_SYNC_FAILED. Neither side-effect rolls back the other — document explicit at-most-once-per-event, no-transaction semantics in the ADR (owned by docs story 4610-cb5e). [adversarial-review, blue-team accepted]
